Pang Zeng йҫҗжӣҫ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Zeng (йҫҗжӣҫ). Carried on the lineage of Pang Yu as his son. Pang Zeng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
